title: 11 people witnessed a UFO making sudden moves on New Year’s Day [2015]
excerpt: JAN 1st, 2015. text_preview: JAN 1st, 2015. At 03h04am, in Guaratiba, Rio de Janeiro-RJ, in the vicinity of the Michelin factory, eleven (11) people reported seeing an unidentified flying object with a round shape and white and blue lights. According to the report given by one of the witnesses to the representative of COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], a student pilot, the object’s shape was of “an inaccurate point”, moving “faster than an approaching aircraft”. The same student pilot described that the object’s approximate altitude was 3,000 feet and that it performed sudden movements. The same witness claim
summary: Eleven people in Guaratiba, Rio de Janeiro saw a round white-and-blue UFO making sudden rapid movements at ~3,000 ft on New Year's Day 2015.
